ddls:
CREATE TABLE "study_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the study program (e.g., AM, AP, AT) */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the study program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_program_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study program attribute */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study program the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., ASM, BOEK, COL) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_program_attributes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES study_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study program the enrollment data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate of the study program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES study_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_program_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program metric */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment record the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., ASM, BOEK, COL) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_program_metrics_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollment_data ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log entry belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study program the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_documents_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES study_programs ("program_id")
)
